content_body: What a blessing. I was here for three days to just "chill." And trust me, you can here. If you took Restoration Hardware, a Home builder, an exquisite stone mason and placed in beautiful Toccoa River/Blue Ridge, GA it would be called Mayfly. With special attention to scale, it is an Architectural Digest and photography lover's dream. Lots of inspiration. High quality touches in every area including the river rock shower and linens. The railroad spike cabinet handles allude to hearing and seeing the train come by around 11:30 most days. Can't wait to come back-- thanks Knight family.
title: What a Blessing
